sections.paragraph: ἀναφαίνω [ἀνά, φαίνω] pass. ‘come into view and become apparent to an observer’ (the Hellenic perspective: ‘be provided an appearance of someth.’) appear Lk 19:11. As nautical term: Engl. idiom requires that the pass. idea of experiencing an appearance be rendered with the active sense come within sight of or simply to sight Ac 21:3.
